sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92868" key="r(ustaktu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥυσ-τακτύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ύος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n92868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dragging about, rough handling</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:18:224" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.224</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
